## Stack
JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, Firebase, Stripe, Three.js, Vitest, Playwright, Vercel

## Flagship projects
- Serrurerie Pro: https://alkhastvatsaev.dev/fr/projets/serrurerie-pro — demo https://serrure.vercel.app — source https://github.com/alkhastvatsaev/Serrurerie-Alsacienne
